items.title: Kenya strike delays flights at international hub airport
items.description: Authorities say they have put in place contingency measures as a labour dispute affects travel.

items.title: ByteDance to curb AI video app after Disney legal threat
items.description: Videos featuring Spider-Man and other characters which are Disney's intellectual property have gone viral since Seedance's update.

items.title: Nigeria warns against enlisting abroad  after reports of deaths in Ukraine
items.description: The authorities say a growing number of citizens are being illegally recruited to fight elsewhere.

items.title: Trump eyes Venezuela visit – but obstacles to his oil plan remain
items.description: The US president wants American energy firms to start extracting the crude but they are reluctant.

items.title: What is the dart frog toxin allegedly used to kill Alexei Navalny?
items.description: The toxin, epibatidine, can be found in frogs in the wild in South America or manufactured in a lab.
